roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S REQ TO ADD TO CAL TO RBW ISSUED 020314 FOR FTA FOR AN FILED
/CAL:INFORMAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/X:THE COURT DEEMS INFORMAL DIVERSION COMPLETED,/X: DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO PC 1385 IS GRANTED BY THE COURT INTHE INTEREST OF JUSTICE,/
/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT REGARDING PROGRAM/CONT/X:CASE IS TO BE DISMISSED UPON NEXT CALLING, AS LONG HAS DEFENDANT IS STILL IN SCHOOL AND HAS NOT PICKEDUP ANY NEW CASES,/
/CAL:PRETRIAL DIVERSION ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:DEFENDANT IS TO CONTINUE ON INFORMAL DIVERSION WITH THE FIRST PLACE FOR YOUTH PROGRAM,/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT FROM FIRST PLACE FOR YOUTH/

/CAL:PRETRIAL/X:A CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT, ALSO APPEARED,/CONTD PTD ELIG RPT/GTWM/X:COUNTS 001-003 CHARGING 242PC-M, 594B2APC-M & 484(A)PC-M ARE REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN ELIGIBILITY REPORT,/X:COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE,/DEF:TO DO ANGER MANAGEMENT AND PAY RESTITUTION TBD BY PTD/DOPU:PTD/PTDIV:07-24-14/CONT/

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT/CTAPPTS:KAMRAN MEYER/X:RACHELFRANCOIS APPEARS UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF KAMRAN MEYER,/BWR:02-03-14/BWR1/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/SA1:CARLOSRAIGOZA/SA1:ANNETTE DOMINGUEZ/DEF:IS TO STAY AT LEAST 10 YARDS FROM THE ABOVE STATED PERSONS/SAORD/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL & DEFENSE MOTION TO COMPEL/X:A CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT ALSO APPEARED,/MO GRTD/CONTD:PRETRIAL/DOP/
